entityType.description: Enum description (0:publish notification 1:staff 2:customer 3:ticket 4:organization 5:general 6:draft 7:ticket message 8:department 9:notification template 10:notification template group 11:chat 12:team 13:hr department 14:leave request 15:attendance dispute 21:ticket create template)

FormEntryCreateRequest.description: List of form entries associated with the ticket

cc.description: List of CC recipient email addresses

items.description: List of CC recipient email addresses

bcc.description: List of BCC recipient email addresses

items.description: List of BCC recipient email addresses

formEntries.description: List of form entries associated with the ticket

TicketCreateByOpenFormRequest.description: Request for creating a ticket through IAM integration or API key

replyMode.description: Reply mode - determines how the message should be processed, only take effect when sourceChannel is AI_ASSISTANT Enum description (1:Send 2:Confirm)

withCC.description: Whether to include CC in the reply recipients, only take effect when message.recipients is null

sourceChannel.description: Source channel of the message Enum description (1:Phone 2:Email 3:Web 4:API 5:Other 6:Open Form 7:Chat Session 8:AI  Assistant 9:Ticket APP 10:Teams 99:Data Entry AI Agent)

replyMessageId.description: ID of the message being replied to

TicketMessageCreateByOpenRequest.description: Request for creating a ticket message by open API

sourceChannel.description: Source channel Enum description (1:Phone 2:Email 3:Web 4:API 5:Other 6:Open Form 7:Chat Session 8:AI  Assistant 9:Ticket APP 10:Teams 99:Data Entry AI Agent)

messageIdAnchor.description: Message ID anchor, return the message before or equal to this message

withReplyMessage.description: Whether to include reply message details

fieldType.description: Enum description (1:Normal Field 2:Relation Field 3:Nested Field 4:Password Field)

ReplyContent.description: The messages that reply to this message

status.description: The status of the message Enum description (1:new 2:sent 3:failed 4:scheduled)

statusReason.description: The reason of the message status

type.description: The type of the message Enum description (1:message 2:system 3:internal_note 4:side_conversation 5:reply 6:escalation)

sourceChannel.description: The source channel of the message Enum description (1:Phone 2:Email 3:Web 4:API 5:Other 6:Open Form 7:Chat Session 8:AI  Assistant 9:Ticket APP 10:Teams 99:Data Entry AI Agent)

userId.description: The user id of the message

userType.description: The type of the user Enum description (1:customer 2:staff 3:system)

replyMessageId.description: The reply message id of the message

firstFlag.description: The first flag of the message

emailId.description: The email id of the message

signatureType.description: The signature type of the message Enum description (1:personal 2:department 3:none 4:team)

replyByMessages.description: The messages that reply to this message

TicketMessageProcessDto.description: The process info of the message

types.description: List of message types to include in the print. If null or empty, all message types will be included

items.description: List of message types to include in the print. If null or empty, all message types will be included Enum description (1:message 2:system 3:internal_note 4:side_conversation 5:reply 6:escalation)

sideConversationId.description: Side conversation ID. If provided, will include side conversation type indicator in the print output

TicketPrintHtmlRequest.description: Request for generating ticket print HTML

aggregationType.description: Type of aggregation to perform (SUM or COUNT) Enum description (1:Sum 2:Count 3:Average)

displayName.description: Display name for the aggregated field in the report

ReportFilterRequest.description: Filter criteria including date range, staff IDs, and grouping options

child.description: Whether the data is a child of a group

additionalProperties.description: Dynamic aggregated field values from form entries

aggregatedFields.description: Dynamic aggregated field values from form entries

additionalProperties.description: Dynamic aggregated field values from form entries

aggregatedFields.description: Dynamic aggregated field values from form entries

StaffStatisticRequest.description: Filter criteria including date range and staff IDs

workStatus.description: Current work status Enum description (0:Clock In 1:Available 2:Working 3:Auxiliary 4:Personal Break 5:Lunch 6:Missing 7:Clock Out)

additionalProperties.description: Work status duration mapping (work status -> duration in minutes)

workStatusDuration.description: Work status duration mapping (work status -> duration in minutes)

StaffReportFilterRequest.description: Filter criteria including date range and staff IDs

workStatus.description: Work status (Work, Break, Offline, etc.) Enum description (0:Clock In 1:Available 2:Working 3:Auxiliary 4:Personal Break 5:Lunch 6:Missing 7:Clock Out)

child.description: Whether the data is a child of a group

additionalProperties.description: Dynamic aggregated field values from form entries

aggregatedFields.description: Dynamic aggregated field values from form entries

solvedTickets.description: Number of tickets marked as solved

totalTimeSpent.description: Total hours spent on ticket activities

timeSpent.description: Average hours spent on ticket activities

firstReplyTime.description: Average seconds to first customer reply

achieveSla.description: Count of tickets meeting SLA requirements

breachedSla.description: Count of tickets that breached SLA

slaBreachTime.description: Average seconds by which SLA was breached

similaritySearch.description: Whether to use similarity search. If true, the keyword will be used as a similarity search. Default is false.

size.description: The size of the search results

includeContent.description: Include content (formData and messages) in search. If false, only search number and subject. Default is true.

crmCodes.description: CRM codes to filter tickets by customer organization

items.description: CRM codes to filter tickets by customer organization

thirdType.description: Third party type (e.g., TMS, WISE, CRM) to distinguish different applications

highlightedContent.description: The highlighted content snippets (with HTML tags)

items.description: The highlighted content snippets (with HTML tags)

thirdId.description: Third-party ID, TMS ID / WISE Org ID

displayStatusSystemStatus.description: The display status system status Enum description (10:open 20:closed 30:archived 40:deleted)

replyStatus.description: Reply status of the ticket Enum description (1:wait_answer 2:answered)

sourceChannel.description: Source channel of the ticket Enum description (1:Phone 2:Email 3:Web 4:API 5:Other 6:Open Form 7:Chat Session 8:AI  Assistant 9:Ticket APP 10:Teams 99:Data Entry AI Agent)

closeFlag.description: Indicates if the ticket has ever been closed

collaboratorFlag.description: Indicates if the ticket involves a collaborator

attachmentFlag.description: Indicates if the ticket has non-inline attachments

fromDirectEmail.description: Indicates if the ticket was created from direct email (system email in To/CC/BCC)

sideConversationHasWaitingReply.description: Whether the side conversation has waiting reply

isOverdue.description: Indicates if the ticket is overdue for resolution

isResponseOverdue.description: Indicates if the ticket is overdue for response

isSlaBreached.description: Indicates if the ticket is SLA breached

NotificationChannelConfigDTO.description: Channel configuration at time of sending

triggerEvent.description: Trigger event Enum description (0:System Operation Failure 1:Ticket Created by Agent 2:Ticket Created by Customer 3:Message from Customer 4:Reply by Agent 5:Side Conversation Created by Agent 6:Side Conversation Reply by Agent 7:Side Conversation Message from Customer 8:Ticket Status Update 9:Ticket Assigned 10:Ticket Public Link 11:Ticket Operation Failure 12:Ticket Internal Note 13:System Notification 14:WFM Attendance Anomaly 15:WFM Approval Pending 16:WFM Schedule Published 17:WFM Schedule Gap Alert 18:WFM Attendance Confirmation Reminder 19:WFM Attendance Dispute Submitted 20:WFM Attendance Dispute Approved 21:WFM Attendance Dispute Rejected 22:WFM Attendance Dispute Revision Required 31:Workflow Task Assignment 32:Workflow Process Completion 50:Reminder 51:Mentioned)

userId.description: User ID who received the notification

userType.description: User type who received the notification Enum description (1:customer 2:staff 3:system)

userName.description: User name who received the notification

relatedEntityType.description: Related entity type Enum description (0:publish notification 1:staff 2:customer 3:ticket 4:organization 5:general 6:draft 7:ticket message 8:department 9:notification template 10:notification template group 11:chat 12:team 13:hr department 14:leave request 15:attendance dispute 21:ticket create template)
